Title: Clarifies what qualifies as the unlawful practice of law
Summary: Clarifies what qualifies as the unlawful practice of law; makes technical changes as to unlawful advertising in procuring a divorce.
LawCode: Amd §§476-a & 496, Judy L; ren §336-b to be §336-c, amd §337, Gen Bus L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the judiciary law and the general business law, in relation to the unlawful practice of law
